Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to analyze a process event log from a financial services company identify activities that appear multiple times within the same case and rename them to reflect their contextual differences

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case C001 Initiate Request Verify Documents first verification found incomplete Call Customer to request missing docs Submit Additional customer uploads ID scan Verify Documents re verification after ID provided Approve Request So Verify Documents appears twice in C001 First time Initial verification incomplete missing docs Second time Re verification after customer provided ID scan

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case C002 Initiate Request Verify Documents identity verification Call Customer outbound call to clarify discrepancy Adjust Account internal adjustment Call Customer follow up call to confirm adjustments Approve Request So Call Customer appears twice in C002 First time Initial outbound call to clarify discrepancy Second time Follow up call to confirm adjustments

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case C003 Initiate Request Verify Documents physical verification of ID Call Customer call to have customer return Adjust Account internal correction Verify Documents re verify docs after account adjustment Approve Request So Verify Documents appears twice in C003 First time Initial physical verification Second time Re verification after account adjustment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Verify Documents appears in C001 C002 and C003 For the initial verification I can rename to Initial Document Verification For the re verification I can rename to Re verify Documents

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Call Customer appears in C001 C002 and C003 For the initial call Initial Customer Call For the follow up call Follow up Customer Call

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Adjust Account does not repeat within the same case so it does not need renaming Submit Additional does not repeat so no renaming needed Initiate Request and Approve Request each appear once per case no renaming needed

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In both cases the first Verify Documents is initial and the second is re check so I can use a consistent naming First occurrence Initial Document Verification Second occurrence Re verify Documents

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For C001 C003 and C002 first call they are all initial outbound calls For C002 second call it is a follow up So Call Customer single or first occurrence Initial Customer Call second occurrence in C002 Follow up Customer Call

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: I considered alternative names such as Verify Documents Initial Check Verify Documents Re check Call Customer Information Request and Call Customer Follow up

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final names Verify Documents first occurrence Initial Document Verification second occurrence Re verify Documents Call Customer first or single occurrence Initial Customer Call second occurrence Follow up Customer Call
